evidence.definition: RT-DETR stands for Real-Time DEtection TRansformer. It is an end-to-end transformer-based object detector designed for real-time inference without a non-maximum suppression post-processing step.

messages.content: RT-DETR stands for Real-Time DEtection TRansformer. It is an end-to-end transformer-based object detector designed for real-time inference without a non-maximum suppression post-processing step.

evidence.definition: ViTPose is a simple human-pose-estimation baseline that uses a plain Vision Transformer as its backbone and a lightweight decoder to predict body keypoints.

messages.content: ViTPose is a human-pose-estimation model that uses a plain Vision Transformer backbone and a lightweight decoder to predict body keypoints.

evidence.definition: UIUC is the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign, a university located in the Champaign-Urbana community in Illinois, United States.

messages.content: UIUC is the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign, located in the Champaign-Urbana community in Illinois, United States.

evidence.profile_relation: Daniel studied at UIUC as an exchange student and worked there as an undergraduate researcher from August to December 2018 on direction-of-arrival estimation with irregular microphone arrays.

messages.content: When did Daniel study at UIUC?
Daniel studied at UIUC as an exchange student and undergraduate researcher from August to December 2018, working on direction-of-arrival estimation with irregular microphone arrays.

evidence.definition: SAM 2 is Meta's unified promptable segmentation model for images and videos. It can select and track an object from prompts such as points, boxes, or masks.

messages.content: SAM 2 is Meta's unified promptable segmentation model for images and videos. It can select and track objects from prompts such as points, boxes, or masks.

evidence.profile_relation: Daniel led the integration of SAM 2 into Hugging Face Transformers, covering image and video processing, checkpoint conversion, documentation, and integration tests.

messages.content: What was Daniel's role in the SAM 2 integration?
Daniel led the integration of SAM 2 into Hugging Face Transformers, covering image and video processing, checkpoint conversion, documentation, and integration tests.

evidence.definition: Molmo 2 is Ai2's family of vision-language models for image and video understanding and grounding, with variants built around openly inspectable components.

messages.content: Molmo 2 is Ai2's vision-language model family for image and video understanding and grounding, with variants built around openly inspectable components.

evidence.profile_relation: Daniel opened Molmo 2 support in Hugging Face Transformers and published the danelcsb/Molmo2-4B checkpoint on the Hugging Face Hub.

messages.content: What did Daniel do with Molmo 2?
Daniel opened Molmo 2 support in Hugging Face Transformers and published the danelcsb/Molmo2-4B checkpoint on the Hugging Face Hub.

evidence.definition: LFM2 is Liquid AI's family of efficient hybrid foundation models designed for fast inference and deployment on resource-constrained and on-device environments.

messages.content: LFM2 is Liquid AI's family of efficient hybrid foundation models designed for fast inference and deployment in resource-constrained and on-device environments.

evidence.profile_relation: Daniel OS uses a fine-tuned LFM2-350M checkpoint for browser-native conversational synthesis.

messages.content: How does this portfolio use LFM2?
Daniel OS uses a fine-tuned LFM2-350M checkpoint for browser-native conversational synthesis.

evidence.definition: WebGPU is a web API that exposes modern GPU capabilities for rendering and general-purpose computation in the browser.

messages.content: WebGPU is a web API that exposes modern GPU capabilities for rendering and general-purpose computation in the browser.

evidence.definition: MobileHumanPose is a real-time monocular 3D human-pose-estimation method designed for mobile devices, using a lightweight 2D detector followed by a 2D-to-3D lifting network.

messages.content: Define MobileHumanPose as a method, not as Daniel's biography.
MobileHumanPose is a real-time monocular 3D human-pose-estimation method for mobile devices. It uses a lightweight 2D detector followed by a 2D-to-3D lifting network.

evidence.definition: ZZAZZ was Team ISLAND's mobile video-editing application for adding and combining motion effects around subjects in videos.

messages.content: ZZAZZ was Team ISLAND's mobile video-editing application for adding and combining motion effects around subjects in videos.
